changes.text: Ultra-fast Proof-of-Work (PoW) solver using multi-threaded Web Workers (up to 10x faster cracking).
Refined LRCLIB Publish system with real-time status tracking and non-blocking background processing.
Resolved UI component conflicts and TypeScript errors in the Search & Import dialogs.
Universal Mobile Optimization: Optimized layouts, font-scaling, and touch interactions across all major dialogs and editors.
Introduced Video Export (MP4) with high-quality Canvas recording and multiple resolutions.
Added Enhanced Metadata Editor for ID3 tags, cover art, and lyric embedding.
Rebranded platform to Yosync Studio with updated UI and visual elements.
Implemented Smart Mixed-Mode sync rendering for video (Switching between word and line sync).
Encrypted Local Storage for sensitive project data.

features: ID3 Metadata Tagging & Cover Art Management
